otherRequirements: Hold an Electronic Travel Authorisation (eTA) when arriving by air; valid up to 5 years or until the passport expires
Border officials may ask for a return or onward ticket and proof of sufficient funds
sourceNote: gov.uk Canada travel advice — visa-free visits normally up to 6 months with an eTA for air travel (https://www.gov.uk/foreign-travel-advice/canada/entry-requirements)
